title: Keurig Dr Pepper (KDP) Q1 Earnings Top Estimates, Sales Up Y/Y
text: Keurig Dr Pepper's (KDP) first-quarter 2023 results were driven by continued brand strength and significant pricing. Both sales and earnings grew year over year.

title: Keurig Dr Pepper, Inc. (KDP) Q1 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Keurig Dr Pepper, Inc. (KDP) Q1 2023 Earnings Call Transcript.

title: Keurig Dr Pepper, Inc (KDP) Surpasses Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Keurig Dr Pepper, Inc (KDP) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.34 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.33 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.33 per share a year ago.

title: Better Pricing To Bolster Keurig Dr Pepper's Q1
text: We expect KDP stock to trend higher, with Q1 revenues and earnings expected to exceed the consensus estimates.

title: How Keurig Dr Pepper's (KDP) Looks Just Ahead of Q1 Earnings
text: Although inflation has been concerning, continued strength in Packaged Beverages and strong in-market performances are likely to have aided Keurig Dr Pepper's (KDP) Q1 performance.

title: What Led To A 22% Rise In Keurig Dr Pepper Stock Since 2019?
text: Despite a 1% fall in Keurig Dr Pepper stock (NYSE: KDP) this year, underperforming the broader S&P500 index, which is up 8%, we believe it has little room for growth.

title: Keurig Dr Pepper: The Recent Share Price Drop Might Not Last For Long
text: Keurig Dr Pepper share price has been under pressure over the recent months due to higher than expected drop in profitability. Beverage segments, however, continue to perform well and would most likely offset weaknesses in coffee.

title: Robert Olstein's Olstein Funds 2022 Semi-Annual Shareholder Letter
Keurig Dr Pepper to Report First Quarter 2023 Results and Host Conference Call
text: BURLINGTON, Mass. and FRISCO, Texas , April 5, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. (NASDAQ: KDP) will release its financial results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2023 before the market opens on Thursday, April 27, 2023.
